name: RappAgent — the RAPP ecosystem in one agent
summary: ONE airdroppable agent that navigates the whole RAPP ecosystem end to end: identity/estate, any door by rappid, local cubbies, shared neighborhoods + cubbies, eggs, the super-RAR, and zero-commit-risk streaming. Embeds the spec so it works offline (the woods); action=refresh pulls the latest global grail (rapp-god + RAPP specs + RAPP-Bible) so it stays drift-free.
tagline: Drop one file in your brainstem → the whole RAPP ecosystem, to spec, no drift.
author: Kody Wildfeuer
